bounded_findings: Search result for `Mikko Porvali` returns the official police appointment article already used in the Finland evidence ladder; this route improves quoted-actor provenance but still does not confirm AI-assisted appeals, fabricated citations, or workload burden.
paper_use: Helps explain why actor verification and phenomenon confirmation must stay separate in reviewer-facing methods text.
caution: Do not promote actor-role confirmation into event confirmation.

query_route: Police report corpus hit from `tekoäly valitukset` query
bounded_findings: The report contains `Tekoälyn tarjoamien mahdollisuuksien hyödyntäminen on vielä alkutekijöissään...`, but the bounded text pass found no appeal-specific or administrative-complaint contamination wording.
paper_use: Adds stronger negative evidence than a search-surface no-hit because an official content-bearing PDF was actually read.
caution: Do not treat generic AI-adoption language as corroboration of the Yle-described procedural phenomenon.

query_route: Police report corpus hit from `tekoäly hallinto-oikeus` query
bounded_findings: The report contains `tekoälyn käyttöönotto poliisitoiminnassa tulee yleistymään, myös rikolliset teot tekoälyä hyödyntämällä`, but the bounded text pass found no administrative-appeal or fabricated-case-reference discussion.
paper_use: Supports a reviewer-safe statement that official Finnish police PDFs do discuss AI generally, yet the exact appeals-contamination phenomenon still remains uncaptured on official text in this pass.
caution: Do not flatten broad AI-in-policing context into proof of contaminated appeals.

query_route: National police board report hit from `Itä-Suomen hallinto-oikeus tekoäly` query
bounded_findings: The report contains one generic AI-utilization sentence and one unrelated `Korkein hallinto-oikeus` reference in a gambling/Ukraine context, but no same-passage support for AI-generated administrative appeals.
paper_use: Shows why keyword collisions inside large official PDFs should not be overread into corroboration.
dashboard_hook: False-positive query-match panel; methods appendix on keyword-collision control
caution: A keyword hit is not a phenomenon hit.

query_route: Police university report hit from `tekoäly oikaisuvaatimus` query
bounded_findings: The report says staff were oriented to AI use and separately records 46 `oikaisuvaatimukset`, but these are education-administration appeals rather than evidence that police/legal institutions are receiving AI-drafted administrative complaints.
paper_use: Provides a clean example of why appeal-language plus AI-language can still be the wrong institutional process family.
dashboard_hook: Keyword-collision guardrail; legal-process family disambiguation panel
caution: Do not convert educational appeal metrics into legal-process contamination evidence.
